prompt: A vast gathering of people photographed from directly above, aerial view. The people form loose clusters — each person stands at the periphery of a group, and each group is itself at the periphery of a larger group. No single person or cluster occupies a clear center. Every individual is surrounded by fewer people than the groups they are adjacent to. The composition spirals outward with no resolution. Muted earth tones, late afternoon light casting long shadows. Photorealistic, cinematic, no text, no labels, no numbers, no charts.
visual_logic: Aerial crowd where every person stands at the edge of a group denser than their own position — locally isolated, globally connected — embodying the structural truth that everyone's neighbours are better connected than they are.
